title: ElNet MC-8 Meter | Control Applications
content_html:
ELNet MC-8 is an 8/24 channel counter

Three-phase energy measurements in Touz
Display of all electricity measurements
Support for 8 three-phase or 24 single-phase channels.
measurement accuracy 0.2%
1600 samples per cycle.
View all electricity measurements.
Collection of daily energy data for 4 months.
Internal memory for collecting data in different sections.
Angia measurements according to the Israeli Ta'oz.
Measuring harmonics up to the 64th harmonic
Support for multiple languages ​​including Hebrew.
RS485 communication
TCP/IP communication is built into the device
Support for BACnet, Modbus protocols
High quality 240X320 color graphic screen.
Graphical waveform display.
Installation on a simple and easy panel rail on the front of the board.
Email support

Related products
